home.meta_title: Porto dos Ribeiros — Brazilian food in Porto
home.meta_description: Brazilian restaurant on Rua da Constituição, Porto. Stroganoff, picanha, coxinhas. Kitchen open all day, from morning coffee to dinner. Order on WhatsApp.

hero.headline: Brazilian home cooking in Porto, from morning coffee to dinner
hero.sub: Stroganoff, picanha and coxinhas in Cedofeita. Kitchen open Sunday to Saturday — no afternoon break.

hours.title: No afternoon break
hours.sub: Kitchen open Sunday through Saturday, straight through lunch and dinner.
hours.footnote: Hours to confirm with the restaurant.

menu_preview.title: Dishes worth coming back for
menu_preview.sub: Brazilian home cooking, on the counter and on the stove all day long.
menu_preview.feature_image_alt: Beef stroganoff with white rice at Porto dos Ribeiros
menu_preview.price_note: Prices to confirm with the restaurant.

jardineira.name: Jardineira
jardineira.desc: Beef and vegetable stew, on the counter daily.

strogonoff.name: Beef stroganoff
strogonoff.desc: Creamy, with white rice and crispy potato sticks.

picanha.name: Picanha
picanha.desc: Sliced to order, cooked the way you like it.

coxinha.name: Chicken coxinha
coxinha.desc: Thin dough, creamy filling — the boteco classic.

empadas.name: Mixed empadas
empadas.desc: Baked in-house, on the counter all day.

reviews.title: What people say on Google
reviews.feature_quote: From the very first visit, this Brazilian restaurant completely stole our hearts. It's not just a place to eat — it feels like family.
reviews.disclaimer: Reviews shown from the public Google profile.
reviews.see_more_aria: See more reviews on the Google profile

visit.title: How to find us
visit.transit: 5 min walk from Carolina Michaëlis station (Metro · Line E)
visit.delivery_title: We deliver up to 3 km from Constituição
visit.delivery_text: Free delivery within 3 km, minimum order 13 €. For longer distances we quote the fee on WhatsApp.
